column1: # GIFNO-FDO-XT-LOGLO-POD tier-2 stability sweep (depth-1 collapse default).
# Every variant builds on the tier-2 convergence band-curriculum base
# (the winning loglo_pod_bandcurr_cl config) and changes one thing, to probe
# MODEL stability of the curriculum transition plus POD/objective knobs.
# The base leaves the transition knobs at their config defaults:
# --- A. Curriculum-transition factorial: 2^3 over the warm-restart smoothness
#        knobs (LR_RESTART_SCALE x RESET_OPT_STATE x RAMP_EPOCHS). tier2_base is
#        the all-default corner and also reproduces the prior ~0.301 result. ---
# --- B. Transition-timing axis (when the phase fires, separate from how smoothly) ---
# --- E. Leading combined candidate (best POD count + gentlest smoothing edges) ---
